goal: Conversational tuning + observability for the turn-taking loop. (1) AEC_PREPROCESS env knob, default off — speex's noise-suppress+AGC+VAD learns a noise floor that carried bot-residual energy across turn boundaries and suppressed user continuation post-barge. Pure AEC residual is fine for Deepgram. (2) CROSSTALK_MIN_WORDS default lowered 3→1 so short follow-ups ('no', 'stop', 'wait') fire an LLM cycle without the user padding. (3) Level pump emits 'listening' vs 'muted' STT state based on finals-gate position so the user can see at a glance when the mic is hot. (4) README adds a Conversational tuning table with troubleshooting recipes mapped to specific env knobs.
